series_metadata.series_title: SOACDF Accounting Descriptions, Expenditure Ledger and Revenue
series_metadata.series_description: SOACDF''s Monthly and annual accounting/expenditure/revenue records not stored in OAKS System or COGNOS Reporting System.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 1year in active files until audited by Auditor of State, then transfer to agency archives for 1 year, or until no longer of agency value., Paper: Shred
